authenticate_user.name: authenticate_user
authenticate_user.docstring: Authenticate a user with username and password using JWT tokens. Validates credentials against the database and returns a session token.

verify_jwt_token.name: verify_jwt_token
verify_jwt_token.docstring: Verify JWT token validity and extract user claims. Checks signature and expiration.

send_notification_email.name: send_notification_email
send_notification_email.signature: send_notification_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> bool
send_notification_email.docstring: Send an email notification to a user via SMTP. Supports HTML templates.

process_payment_stripe.name: process_payment_stripe
process_payment_stripe.docstring: Process credit card payment through Stripe payment gateway. Returns transaction ID.

validate_email_format.name: validate_email_format
validate_email_format.docstring: Validate email address format using regex pattern. Returns True if valid.
